display_name: RollingAI 影像玻璃 H5（粒子地球 · 实景影像 · 磨砂玻璃）
$comment_render_entry: Same engine as rolling-deck (particle globe / glass / fit-to-stage), different component library: a consulting/methodology vocabulary (thesis route, 3x3 matrix dashboard, position-group playbooks, service-mode panels, reporting boards, risk command center, business-model ladder). Splices deck.json slides[].data.html into the template's <main class="deck">. Each slide is layout=raw. Authoring is conversational (copy template.html, hand-fill sections); render.py lets the dispatcher render an existing deck.json into the v2 shell.
$comment_layouts: rolling-deck-v2 uses raw HTML sections, not structured layouts. Each <section class="slide"> is layout=raw with data.html holding the full section markup. reference.md is the authoring vocabulary (matrix-dashboard, risk-command, business-ladder, etc.) — CSS classes, not deck.json layouts.
